message:
chore(beads): create comprehensive epic bd-zh1y for remaining host delegations

New epic bd-zh1y with 7 child beads and 13 grandchild subtasks covering
all 35 remaining resolve_host_symbol_raw calls (38 minus 3 in
host_resolve.rs which is the resolver infrastructure itself).

Structure:
- bd-zh1y.1: pthread extensions (5 delegations, 4 subtasks)
- bd-zh1y.2: setjmp/longjmp x86_64 asm (7 delegations, 3 subtasks)
- bd-zh1y.3: io_internal native FILE (8 delegations, 4 subtasks)
- bd-zh1y.4: stdio globals (5 delegations, blocked by .3)
- bd-zh1y.5: dlfcn interpose classification (5 delegations)
- bd-zh1y.6: stdlib environ ownership (3 delegations, 2 subtasks)
- bd-zh1y.7: resolv getaddrinfo (2 delegations, 3 subtasks)

Key insight: 18 of 35 are intentional interpose delegations (correct
behavior for LD_PRELOAD mode). The genuinely missing native impls are
setjmp (7), io_internal (8), and resolv (2) = 17 calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
